{"success":true,"response":"The process `J09C` has been executed end-to-end:

- Created and classified the working table `J09C_temp` for all tours starting with `J09C`, applying the KSA/EVU rules (by HAUS, HOUSE_NUM1 ranges, and Wiblingwerde/Breckerfeld).
- Enriched the data by linking to installation and meter-reading documents, then joined with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`, using sales data where available and otherwise net data.
- Identified all `EQUNR` with “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” entries in both 2023 and 2024, and set their `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING`.
- Exported:
  - `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (1,230 rows) with the specified columns and emailed it to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09C.csv` (24,016 rows, all non-mandatory entries) with the specified columns and emailed it to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped all temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_enriched`, `J09C_enriched2`, `J09C_mandatory_eq`).

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used or a sample of the exported data.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
The process `J09C` has been executed end-to-end:

- Created and classified the working table `J09C_temp` for all tours starting with `J09C`, applying the KSA/EVU rules (by HAUS, HOUSE_NUM1 ranges, and Wiblingwerde/Breckerfeld).
- Enriched the data by linking to installation and meter-reading documents, then joined with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`, using sales data where available and otherwise net data.
- Identified all `EQUNR` with “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” entries in both 2023 and 2024, and set their `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING`.
- Exported:
  - `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (1,230 rows) with the specified columns and emailed it to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09C.csv` (24,016 rows, all non-mandatory entries) with the specified columns and emailed it to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped all temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_enriched`, `J09C_enriched2`, `J09C_mandatory_eq`).

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used or a sample of the exported data.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id = 'J09C'` has been executed successfully end-to-end.  

Summary of what was done:

- Built and classified working table `J09C_temp` for all tours starting with `J09C`, applying the defined KSA/EVU classification rules (house ranges, Wiblingwerde/Breckerfeld logic).
- Enriched data with installation and meter-reading documents; joined with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`, preferring sales data where available, else falling back to net data.
- Detected all `EQUNR` that had “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” entries in both 2023 and 2024 and set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = MANDATORY_READING` for them.
- Exported and sent:
  - `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (1,230 rows) to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09C.csv` (24,016 rows, all remaining non-mandatory entries) to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped temporary tables: `J09C_temp`, `J09C_enriched`, `J09C_enriched2`, `J09C_mandatory_eq`.

If you tell me what you need next, I can:
- Show or explain the SQL/logic behind any step, or  
- Provide an example schema/column listing for the exported CSVs, or  
- Re-run/adjust this process for a different tour prefix.
